name: Peg-in-Hole 정밀 삽입
description: 빨간 peg를 노란 hole에 삽입하는 정밀 조작 데모. 모델 토너먼트 벤치마크와 동일한 MuJoCo 환경(scene_peg.xml)을 사용한다. wrist 2-cam 셋업.
description_en: Precision insertion of a red peg into a yellow hole. Uses the same MuJoCo environment (scene_peg.xml) as the model-tournament benchmark. Wrist 2-cam setup.
task_language: insert the red peg into the yellow hole
